pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-023 (AI and Machine Learning) scores 0.404 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Cloud Platform Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI and Machine Learning KSA AI-K-023 as a discrete competency for Cloud Platform Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Cloud Platform Engineer.
